description.text: enumeration: 0173-1#07-AAS927#001 (administrativ contact), 0173-1#07-AAS928#001 (commercial contact), 0173-1#07-AAS929#001 (other contact), 0173-1#07-AAS930#001 (hazardous goods contact), 0173-1#07-AAS931#001 (technical contact). Note: the above mentioned ECLASS enumeration should be declared as “open” for further addition. ECLASS enumeration IRDI is preferable. If no IRDI available, custom input as String may also be accepted.
